news:news.news:title: Global tensions rise as Israel intensifies military actions in Lebanon and Trump faces scrutiny over NATO comments amid ongoing conflicts.
news:news.news:keywords: Israel military actions in Lebanon, Trump NATO comments implications, Hungary political landscape changes, South Africa crime and military intervention, Burundi ammunition depot explosions news

news:news.news:title: SpaceX confidentially files for a public offering, while oil prices drop and markets rally following Trump's comments on the Iran conflict.
news:news.news:keywords: SpaceX IPO news, Oil price fluctuations, Oracle job cuts and AI investment, US fuel price increase, Washington millionaire tax implications

news:news.news:title: NASA successfully launched the Artemis II mission, marking a significant step towards returning humans to the Moon.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission launch, legal issues surrounding Moon base project, Apple's iPhone anniversary, Kia EV3 electric SUV announcement, April Fools' Day tech pranks

news:news.news:title: NBA teams are preparing for the final weeks of the regular season while Tiger Woods receives permission for treatment outside the U.S.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA Power Rankings updates, Draymond Green future with Warriors, Tiger Woods treatment news, Kansas basketball coach return, NCAA eligibility rule changes

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries range from advancements in sleep and muscle growth to insights into ancient marine life and the evolution of squid.
news:news.news:keywords: impact of drugs on shift work, new dinosaur discovery, ocean health indicators, DNA supergenes and evolution, effects of caffeine on behavior

news:news.news:title: Iran is reportedly using children in security roles amid ongoing conflicts, raising serious humanitarian concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict updates, Iran child security roles, Lebanon peacekeeper casualties, India census 2026, Chiang Mai air pollution health risks

news:news.news:title: US average fuel prices exceed $4 per gallon for the first time in four years amid ongoing conflict in Iran, impacting markets and consumer sentiment.
news:news.news:keywords: US fuel prices and market impact, Iran conflict and economic implications, Federal funding for public broadcasting, Millionaire tax in Washington state, OpenAI profitability and IPO prospects

news:news.news:title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers significant discounts on various tech products, while new AI developments continue to emerge in the technology sector.
news:news.news:keywords: Amazon Big Spring Sale discounts, AI advancements in technology, smart home devices deals

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods is stepping away from golf to seek treatment following his recent arrest, while the U.S. soccer team struggles with a loss to Portugal.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods treatment announcement, USMNT soccer loss to Portugal, NFL Rooney Rule support, Italy World Cup elimination, Ovechkin's record-breaking season

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal new insights into asteroids, blood pressure management, evolutionary biology, and the behavior of materials, highlighting ongoing advancements in various fields.
news:news.news:keywords: asteroid chemistry, blood pressure management, squid evolution, deep sleep benefits, non-drug arthritis therapies

news:news.news:title: China Intervenes in Iran Conflict, Challenging Its Peacemaker Image Amid Global Tensions
